label.bringDoctorMaheswaran: Convince Doctor Maheswaran to come with you while you investigate, for her safety and yours.
label.leaveDoctorMaheswaranWithPatients: Convince Doctor Maheswaran to stay with the patients and keep them safe while you investigate.

easyStandard.skull: -1 (-3 instead if you are engaged with a _Staff_ enemy).
easyStandard.cultist: Reveal another chaos token. If you fail and it is agenda 2 or 3, make an infestation test.
easyStandard.elderThing: -X. X is the number of infested locations.

hardExpert.skull: -2 (-4 instead if you are engaged with a _Staff_ enemy).
hardExpert.cultist: Reveal another chaos token. If it is agenda 2 or 3, make an infestation test.
hardExpert.elderThing: -X. X is 1 higher than the number of infested locations.

waitingRoom.resign: You flee the hospital, leaving your companions behind.

containingTheOutbreak.sealRift: {'{'}action{'}'}: Test {'{'}willpower{'}'} (X) to attempt to seal the rift. X is this location's shroud. Investigators at this location may spend 1 {'{'}perPlayer{'}'} clues, as a group, to automatically succeed. If you succeed, replace the damage token on this location with a horror token. For the remainder of the game, this location cannot become infested.
